headline: Q1 Rundown: Regions Financial (NYSE:RF) Vs Other Regional Banks Stocks
summary: As the craze of earnings season draws to a close, here’s a look back at some of the most exciting (and some less so) results from Q1. Today, we are looking at regional banks stocks, starting with Regions Financial (NYSE:RF).
